zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy於1094年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福多時，他的父親Herve de Léon I25歲，母親Lithuise Adela de Navarre23歲。他於大約1130年與Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES結婚。他去世於1157年在法國崔洛易特吉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy于1094年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福多时，他的父亲Herve de Léon I25岁，母亲Lithuise Adela de Navarre23岁。他于大约1130年与Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES结婚。他去世于1157年在法国崔洛易特吉享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Donzy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dansie
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e), for someone from Anizy in Calvados, France, recorded in 1155 in the form Anisie. De Anesi became Danesi. The placename is probably derived from the Gallo-Roman personal name Anitius (of uncertain origin) + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy was born in 1094, in Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Herve de Léon I, was 25 and his mother, Lithuise Adela de Navarre, was 23. He married Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES about 1130. He died in 1157, in Gien, Loiret, Centre, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy est né en 1094, à Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Herve de Léon I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lithuise Adela de Navarre, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES environ 1130. Il est décédé en 1157, à Gien, Loiret, Centre, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy 1094 in Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herve de Léon I 25 und seine Mutter Lithuise Adela de Navarre 23. Er hat um 1130 Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES geheiratet. Er starb 1157 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Gien, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy è nato il nel 1094 nel Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Herve de Léon I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lithuise Adela de Navarre, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES circa 1130. Morì nel 1157, nel Gien, Loiret, Centre, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzyが1094年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeニevアドンズイで生まれた時，父Herve de Léon Iは25歳，母Lithuise Adela de Navarreは23歳であった。約1130年にLithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYESと結婚した。彼は1157年にフランスセントアロイアーエトギンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy(이)가 1094년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 니e브르 돈즈이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herve de Léon I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lithuise Adela de Navarre(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1130년 Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1157년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 기에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy nasceu em 1094, em Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Herve de Léon I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lithuise Adela de Navarre, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES aproximadamente 1130. Ele faleceu em 1157, em Gien, Loiret, Centre, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy родился в 1094 г. в местности донзи, ниeвр, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Herve de Léon I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lithuise Adela de Navarre, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES около 1130 г. Он умер в 1157 г. в местности гиен, лоирет, кентр, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy nació en 1094, en Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Herve de Léon I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lithuise Adela de Navarre, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lithuaise DE TROYES DE MONTLHERY-DE TROYES aproximadamente 1130. Murió en 1157, en Gien, Loiret, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
